<!---

title: fix: corrects an indentation error

<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
To provide visibility into the current status of the CLA workflow directly on the project landing page.

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->

- Solution implemented
-->
- Updated README.md to include a badge that links to the newly created CLA workflow.

title: docs: add CLA status badge to README
